parsed.production_notes: The video uses AI-generated animation, evident from the slightly uncanny, overly smooth faces and static background elements. The lip-syncing is unnatural, and there are minor inconsistencies in the characters' features between frames.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, medium build, fair complexion. Dark hair with a mustache. Wearing glasses.
Young boy, slim build, fair complexion. Short dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Red t-shirt and white wired earphones.

characters.appearance: Young to middle-aged woman, medium build, fair complexion. Dark hair tied back. Wears a red bindi.
characters.wardrobe: Green blouse and a yellow/orange saree.

scenes.setting: Cozy dining room, daytime, wooden table, plate of sweets, wall calendar, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on the left, holding a newspaper. Character B, wearing earphones, looks at a smartphone in the middle. Character C holds a smartphone to her ear, smiling. A plate of round sweets is on the wooden table. The background has a wall calendar and a small shrine.

scenes.visual_description: An animated family sits at a dining table. The mother receives a call and speaks English confidently. The father and son react with surprise. Text overlays show the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಕಾಲ್ ಯಾರ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೋ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ನೋಡ್ತೀಯಾ [Can you see who is calling?]
Character C says: Hello... yes that works for us. No, we don't use a credit card. We prefer to manage expenses carefully and avoid unnecessary debt. All right, thank you.
Character A says: ಸೂಪರ್ ಕಣೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ದೆ [Super dear, how confidently you spoke in English]
Character B says: ಹೌದು ಅಮ್ಮ, ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ [Yes mom, you speak English so awesomely]
Character A says: ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲ ಹೆಂಗೆ ಸಾಧ್ಯ ಆಯ್ತು [But how did all this become possible?]
Character C says: ಇದೆಲ್ಲ My Sivi App ಇಂದ ರೀ [All this is from My Sivi App]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಕಾಲ್ ಯಾರ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೋ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ನೋಡ್ತೀಯಾ (Can you see who is calling?)
Hello... yes that works for us. No, we don't use a credit card. We prefer to manage expenses carefully and avoid unnecessary debt. All right, thank you.
ಸೂಪರ್ ಕಣೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ದೆ (Super dear, how confidently you spoke in English)
ಹೌದು ಅಮ್ಮ, ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ (Yes mom, you speak English so awesomely)
ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲ ಹೆಂಗೆ ಸಾಧ್ಯ ಆಯ್ತು (But how did all this become possible?)
ಇದೆಲ್ಲ My Sivi App ಇಂದ ರೀ (All this is from My Sivi App)

scenes.setting: Digital app interface, light background, purple accents.

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital graphic featuring a stylized 3D robot character with blue accents on a white background. Below the robot are simple illustrations including a person's profile, a calendar page, and a sun.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of a mobile app interface. It shows an AI robot avatar and a grid of learning modules. Text overlays highlight the features.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: ಅದ್ರಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ಅವ್ರು ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ [There is an AI teacher in it. They teach English from Kannada whenever you want]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಅದ್ರಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ಅವ್ರು ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ (There is an AI teacher in it. They teach English from Kannada whenever you want)

scenes.setting: Cozy dining room, daytime, wooden table, plate of sweets, wall calendar, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A looks surprised, holding his newspaper. Character B leans in with wide eyes, looking at Character C's phone. Character C smiles warmly, holding her smartphone up. The plate of sweets remains on the table.

scenes.visual_description: The family continues talking at the table. The father expresses disbelief, and the mother explains the app's cost. Text overlays display the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ ನನಗಿಗ್ ನಂಬೋಕೆ ಆಗ್ತಿಲ್ಲ ಕಣೆ. ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಖರ್ಚು ಆಯ್ತು [Is it? I can't believe it dear. How much did this cost?]
Character C says: ನೀವು ಓದುತ್ತಿರೋ newspaper ಗಿಂತಲೂ ಕಮ್ಮಿ [Less than the newspaper you are reading]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಹೌದಾ ನನಗಿಗ್ ನಂಬೋಕೆ ಆಗ್ತಿಲ್ಲ ಕಣೆ. ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಖರ್ಚು ಆಯ್ತು (Is it? I can't believe it dear. How much did this cost?)
ನೀವು ಓದುತ್ತಿರೋ newspaper ಗಿಂತಲೂ ಕಮ್ಮಿ (Less than the newspaper you are reading)

panels.panel_visual_description: A dark digital background. At the top center is a small illustration of a red gift box. Below it are large numerals '3' and '1'. The color palette is dark grey with gold and white accents.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the app's pricing page. It highlights a special offer of 1 Rupee. Text overlays emphasize the low cost.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: ಬರೀ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಅಷ್ಟೇ [Just one rupee]

scenes.setting: Cozy dining room, daytime, wooden table, plate of sweets, wall calendar, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B looks excited, raising his hand slightly. Character A smiles in agreement. Character C holds her phone, pointing towards the screen cheerfully. The plate of sweets is on the table.

scenes.visual_description: The son and father enthusiastically agree to join. The mother encourages them to install the app. Text overlays display the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ [Then I will join right now]
Character A says: ನಾನು ಕೂಡ [Me too]
Character C says: ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ install button ಅನ್ನು press ಮಾಡಿ Mysivi app ಅಲ್ಲಿ sign up ಆಗಿ [Then press the install button right now and sign up on the Mysivi app]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ (Then I will join right now)
ನಾನು ಕೂಡ (Me too)
ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ install button ಅನ್ನು press ಮಾಡಿ Mysivi app ಅಲ್ಲಿ sign up ಆಗಿ (Then press the install button right now and sign up on the Mysivi app)
install now
